name: Pilot Travel Center #1027
description: Full-service Pilot travel center at the I-40 and US-385 junction, the main truck stop on the west side of the panhandle, with diesel lanes, showers, laundry and a CAT scale.

name: CAT Scale at Pilot Travel Center Vega
description: Certified CAT Scale located at the Pilot Travel Center off I-40 Exit 36 in Vega for truck weighing.

name: Vega Truck Stop and Indian Kitchen
description: Independent 24-hour travel center at I-40 Exit 36 (formerly Kevin's Texas Quick Stop) offering fuel, parking, showers, laundry and a Punjabi/Indian kitchen.

name: Rose Punjab Truck Repair Shop & Road Service
description: Independent commercial truck repair and mobile road service shop off I-40 Exit 22 in Adrian near the Route 66 midpoint, handling breakdowns, brakes, tires and diagnostics.
